arts.ttl: Smiling Coventry City forward given fresh start under Frank Lampard
arts.sum: Fabio Tavares has been assured by Frank Lampard that if he “shows himself” in training then he’ll get his chance at Coventry City. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: Coventry City boss Frank Lampard delivers Hull City verdict ahead of lunchtime meeting
arts.sum: While City narrowly missed out on the top six last term, finishing seventh, Coventry went close to snatching a play-off spot under Robins but did reach an FA Cup final, and with both teams struggling in the early months of this season, Lampard believes the league table counts for little at this juncture. The Tigers did manage a 1-1 draw with Watford in midweek to end a run of six straight defeats, with Ruben Selles coming agonisingly close to securing victory in his first game in charge and now eying a first victory in more than seventy days .

arts.ttl: 'Unbelievable' - Coventry City man relishing return of Hull City star Kasey Palmer - Hull Live
arts.sum: “Yeah probably (Palmer will get stick), because you’ve trained with him and know what he’s capable of, but I think it’s important to treat him like any other player. Coventry City defender Bobby Thomas admits the Sky Blues will be looking to nulify the impact of Kasey Palmer when he makes his first return to the CBS Arena in Saturday's early kick-off.

arts.ttl: Coventry City boss makes Hull admission as newbies Frank Lampard and Ruben Selles go head to head
arts.sum: To that end, Lampard insists that he will focus on what his Sky Blues players can do to Hull rather than worry too much about what the opposition are capable of inflicting on Coventry as he prepares his side for a run of five games which sees City face four of the clubs currently in the bottom four of the division, starting with Hull, then Portsmouth, Plymouth and Cardiff City after entertaining Millwall. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: Hull City boosted on eve of Coventry City clash as Ruben Selles looks to the future
arts.sum: Watching the Watford game back, Selles, along with his coaching staff, believes there were plenty of positives to take, but plenty to work on, and that's something they've been looking to pick up on in training, and team meetings, over the past few hours. After a run of 44 straight games, Jones has missed the last two with a hamstring complaint but returned to training ahead of the trip to the Midlands and will be in the squad at the CBS Arena, and could yet return to Ruben Selles’ first starting XI away from home as he looks to back up his opening draw with Watford by earning a first win as City head coach.

arts.ttl: Bobby Thomas on ‘quite random’ Kasey Palmer and the reception he’s likely to get on return to Coventry City
arts.sum: Asked if knowing a player that well can help when facing them on the opposition, he said: “Yeah probably, because you’ve trained with him and know what he’s capable of, but I think it’s important to treat him like any other player.” Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard provides injury update on Haji Wright & Ben Wilson ahead of busy festive period
arts.sum: Frank Lampard admits that leading scorer Haji Wright is not expected to be back fit for Coventry City heading into the busy festive period. Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group.

arts.ttl: Alzate starts again: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Coventry City
arts.sum: Hull City are back in Championship action this weekend with an away trip to Coventry City. Hull City… The post Alzate starts again: Hull City team news and predicted XI to face Coventry City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: New manager's first task at Hull City is an easy one, admits ex-Chelsea striker
arts.sum: One of the first tasks for Hull City's new head coach Ruben Selles will be to fill his players with confidence and generally make the squad feel better about themselves. That's according to Mason Burstow, who believes a manager who gives his players the belief and confidence in what they're doing will go a long way to getting City out of the mess they've been left in.

Coventry continue to curse the absence of the injured Haji Wright after attempting 17 shots without finding the back of the net in a 2-0 defeat to West Brom in midweek. The Sky Blues have won just o...
